dataset: NCEP Reanalysis Derived Surface Air Temperature

pi_items.source: Task scenario flavor text; not an empirically verifiable fact.
Task scenario flavor text; not an empirically verifiable fact.
Verified by reviewing setup_task.sh and install_panoply.sh which download and reference the data at this path.
Verified by reading the netCDF variables using Python from the NCEP dataset 'air.mon.ltm.nc'.
Verified by reviewing setup_task.sh where OUTPUT_DIR is defined.
Verified by reviewing export_result.sh which requires these exact file paths to exist.
Verified by running a custom python script on the real air.mon.ltm.nc file, analyzing lat 45.0, lon 285.0 (360-75) and finding month 1 (Jan) is the coldest at -9.66°C.
Verified by empirical data analysis of the NCEP dataset at lat 45N, lon 75W (285E) which showed December (-5.92°C), January (-9.66°C), February (-8.55°C), and March (-3.81°C) are all below 0°C.

privileged_info_summary: The task utilizes a real-world NCEP Reanalysis Derived Surface Air Temperature dataset (air.mon.ltm.nc). Independent python analysis of this dataset at the required coordinates (Latitude 45°N, Longitude 285°E/75°W) confirmed that the correct coldest month is January (-9.66°C) and the sub-freezing months are December, January, February, and March. The target paths, variables, and output expectations accurately match the verification and setup scripts.
